pr.title: TObj mostly matched, GXSetTexCoordGen2 match, and various GX type cleanup/additions
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Matched most of sysdolphin baselib TObj and replaced GXSetTexCoordGen2's NOT_IMPLEMENTED body with a typed implementation, while cleaning up GX texture/TLUT/framebuffer prototypes and related baselib naming. The PR body states TObj was matched except for a regswap in HSD_TObjSetupTextureCoordGen. It also renamed symbols such as allocShadowTObj to HSD_TObjAlloc and HSD_TlutFree to HSD_TlutRemove, added GX enum/type coverage for CI texture formats and TLUT objects, and propagated HSD_ImageDesc field naming from img_ptr to image_ptr.
what_changed: Added a large TObj C implementation in src/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.c, including texture matrix setup, texture coordinate generation setup, volatile TEV setup, TExp construction helpers, resource assignment, texture/TLUT setup, allocation/free/remove helpers, image-desc EFB copy support, and TObj class init/release/amnesia logic.

Implemented GXSetTexCoordGen2 in src/dolphin/gx/GXAttr.c with typed parameters, XF register writes through WGPIPE, source/type switch handling for GX_TG_POS/NRM/BINRM/TANGENT/COLOR/TEX sources, bump/SRTG handling, matrix index state updates in __GXContexts, and a final __GXSetMatrixIndex call.
Changed GXSetTexCoordGen2 declaration from raw u32/s32 parameters to GXTexCoordID, GXTexGenType, GXTexGenSrc, u32, GXBool, u32.
Added GX enum coverage for GXCITexFmt, GXTlut, and GXTlutFmt in GXEnum.h.
Added GXTlutObj as a forward-declared GX type and a placeholder struct containing three u32 words in __types.h.

Retyped GX texture APIs: GXInitTexObj, GXInitTexObjCI, GXInitTexObjLOD, GXLoadTexObjPreLoaded, GXLoadTexObj, GXInitTlutObj, and GXLoadTlut now use GXTexObj/GXTlutObj pointers and GX enums instead of unk_t/s32/u32 placeholders.
Retyped framebuffer copy APIs GXSetTexCopySrc and GXSetTexCopyDst to use meaningful width/height/source names and GXTexFmt/GXBool for texture-copy destination parameters.
Renamed allocShadowTObj to HSD_TObjAlloc and HSD_TlutFree to HSD_TlutRemove in asm labels, callsites, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Updated shadow and cmsnap code to use HSD_ImageDesc.image_ptr instead of img_ptr, including NULL usage and GXCopyTex calls.
Changed HSD_LObjGetLightMaskDiffuse return type from s32 to GXLightID.
Added -Wno-tautological-compare to compile_flags.txt; the PR does not explicitly explain why, but the diff includes decomp-style code that can trigger tautological-compare warnings.
smart_moves: Matched decomp work by first tightening public GX prototypes and enums, letting TObj call GX APIs with domain-specific types instead of broad integer placeholders.
Kept symbol map, assembly labels, and C callsites synchronized when promoting allocShadowTObj to the clearer global symbol HSD_TObjAlloc and separating HSD_TlutRemove from HSD_TlutFree semantics.
Used SDK-like GX naming for parameters such as image_ptr, width, height, wrap_s, wrap_t, mipmap, min_lod, max_lod, lod_bias, and max_aniso, which makes later matching and callsite auditing easier.
Preserved evidence of remaining mismatch in the PR body: nearly all TObj matched except a regswap in HSD_TObjSetupTextureCoordGen, avoiding overclaiming full completion.
Replaced ad-hoc string globals for asserts/panics with __FILE__ and HSD_ASSERT patterns in TObj, reducing artificial data symbols while keeping assert behavior represented.
Modeled texture/TLUT setup through GXInitTexObjCI, GXInitTlutObj, and GXLoadTlut rather than open-coding, aligning baselib TObj behavior with typed GX interfaces.
decomp_lessons: For large baselib matches, unblock source matching by improving low-level SDK headers first; precise GX enum and struct types can reduce casts and clarify switch values in higher-level code.
When a function's real role is discovered, rename all three layers together: asm labels, symbols.txt, and C references. This PR demonstrates that for HSD_TObjAlloc and HSD_TlutRemove.
If a matched implementation still has a known regswap, record it explicitly in the PR text so future workers know which function and mismatch remain.
Texture object decomp benefits from separating ownership helpers: HSD_TlutFree performs raw memory-piece free, while HSD_TlutRemove null-checks then frees; using both names documents intent.
Field renames such as img_ptr to image_ptr should be propagated immediately through dependent systems like shadow and cmsnap to avoid split vocabulary.
Typed GX prototypes are reusable scaffolding: later GXTexture.c work can fill NOT_IMPLEMENTED bodies against already-correct signatures.

TObj setup spans multiple subsystems: texture matrices, camera/light vectors, TEV stages, TExp expressions, resource assignment, TLUT management, and GX texture loading must be matched coherently rather than as isolated functions.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_TObjAlloc for the global TObj allocator instead of allocShadowTObj.
Use HSD_TlutRemove for the null-safe TLUT removal wrapper; keep HSD_TlutFree for the raw hsdFreeMemPiece helper.
Use image_ptr for HSD_ImageDesc image memory, not img_ptr.
Use GXTexObj* and GXTlutObj* for GX texture/TLUT object APIs instead of unk_t.

Use GXTexFmt for regular texture formats, GXCITexFmt for CI texture formats, GXTlutFmt for TLUT formats, GXTexWrapMode for wrap_s/wrap_t, GXBool for boolean GX parameters, and GXTexMapID/GXTexCoordID for map/coord identifiers.
Use descriptive framebuffer copy parameter names left, top, wd, and ht for GXSetTexCopySrc.
Use sysdolphin_base_library and hsd_tobj class-name strings in HSD_TObj class initialization.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Promoted asm functions by renaming .fn/.endfn labels in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s and updating branch targets to the new symbol names.
Updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt at the same addresses for renamed functions, preserving function sizes and scopes while improving names.
Replaced NOT_IMPLEMENTED in GXSetTexCoordGen2 with a full implementation using WGPIPE writes and INSERT_FIELD bitfield operations to match GX hardware register programming.
Added TObj C implementations while leaving the PR body to document the one known remaining regswap in HSD_TObjSetupTextureCoordGen.
Added -Wno-tautological-compare, likely to tolerate decompilation-shaped expressions during matching; the dump does not include an explicit rationale.
Used exact GX enum constants in switches and callsites, which makes generated code more likely to line up with SDK-style control flow than raw magic numbers.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that resolve the HSD_TObjSetupTextureCoordGen regswap mentioned in PR #1184.
Search for follow-up implementations of GXInitTexObj, GXInitTexObjCI, GXInitTexObjLOD, GXInitTlutObj, and GXLoadTlut after their prototypes were typed here.
Audit remaining uses of img_ptr versus image_ptr in HSD_ImageDesc-related code.
Check whether DifferentTluts or related TLUT comparison logic was corrected in a later PR.
Find subsequent cleanup around GXTlutObj dummy layout once the real GX TLUT object fields were recovered.
